{"description":"emitNewPathClientEvent posts interstitial_shown and related events to /api/telemetry/new-path-events, but no matching app route exists in frontend/src/app/api.

In production testing (branch context: new-path-events), telemetry request returns 405 Method Not Allowed for payload {event_name:'interstitial_shown', payload:{...}}.

Code evidence:
- frontend/src/lib/newPathTelemetryClient.ts line 9 sets DEFAULT_ENDPOINT='/api/telemetry/new-path-events'.
- frontend/src/modules/session/interstitial/InterstitialController.tsx emits interstitial_shown.
- No route file exists at frontend/src/app/api/telemetry/new-path-events/route.ts.

Expected:
- Add POST route /api/telemetry/new-path-events that validates event_name+payload via validateNewPathEvent/newPathEventLogger and returns 2xx non-blocking, OR
- Update client endpoint to an existing compatible route and contract."}

new_value:
{"description":"Live e2e validation found closure of 340-345 was premature. API/tests landed, but primary /writer journey is missing required wiring and recall UX behaviors.

Confirmed misses:
- /writer starts session directly without URL capture or resume gate
- onboarding/acceleration/linkedin planning modules are not reachable from primary workflow
- recall progress (anchors/actions/outcomes) remains zero in active flow due missing live wiring
- stop-state controls (re-record/start over/incomplete prompts) are missing
- move-on intents (next question / move on / skip) are not handled in active recall flow
- Path 345 telemetry ingest route is missing: client emits to POST /api/telemetry/new-path-events but no corresponding API route exists, causing runtime 405 in new-path-events testing for interstitial_shown payloads.

Track remediation through child issues and plan/spec updates in thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-03-03--07-51--tdd-voice-assisted-session-ui-ux-orchestration-340-345.md and specs/voice-assisted-session-ui-ux.md.","status":"open"}

new_value:
{"description":"emitNewPathClientEvent posts interstitial_shown and related events to /api/telemetry/new-path-events, but no matching app route exists in frontend/src/app/api.

In production testing (branch context: new-path-events), telemetry request returns 405 Method Not Allowed for payload {event_name:'interstitial_shown', payload:{...}}.

Code evidence:
- frontend/src/lib/newPathTelemetryClient.ts line 9 sets DEFAULT_ENDPOINT='/api/telemetry/new-path-events'.
- frontend/src/modules/session/interstitial/InterstitialController.tsx emits interstitial_shown.
- No route file exists at frontend/src/app/api/telemetry/new-path-events/route.ts.

Required implementation function(s):
- POST /api/telemetry/new-path-events
- OPTIONS /api/telemetry/new-path-events (preflight-safe browser delivery)

Required behavior:
- Validate event_name + payload via validateNewPathEvent/newPathEventLogger.
- Delegate sink routing through TypedTelemetryGateway.
- Preserve non-blocking telemetry semantics (accepted response even when sink write fails, with structured warning logs).","status":"open"}

{"id":"silmari-writer-qqt","title":"Recall slot clarity and stop-state controls","description":"e2e gap: after stopping recording, anchors/actions/outcomes remain at zero and are not explained; user lacks stop-state controls and cannot reliably issue move-on intents.\\n\\nRequired outcomes:\\n- Wire live persisted progress into recall UI (remove static zero fallback)\\n- Add helper copy for anchors/actions/outcomes semantics\\n- On stop: show re-record, start-over, continue/next-question controls\\n- Present incomplete prompts/slots in actionable language\\n- Handle user intents: next question / move on / skip with incomplete-slot guardrails\\n- Emit telemetry for stop action, move-on intent, and incomplete-slot presentation","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@maceojourdan.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T15:34:52Z","created_by":"maceojourdan","updated_at":"2026-03-03T15:34:52Z"}

- Delegate sink routing through TypedTelemetryGateway.

old_value: {"id":"silmari-writer-yy2","title":"TLA+ model: auth identity collision + error propagation","description":"Extracted from AuthAndValidationFilter.ts, ChannelIngestionPipelineAdapter.ts. 5 invariants, all VIOLATED in buggy mode. Two composing bugs: (1) JWT token.substring(0,8) collapses all users to same userId, defeating user-scoped uniqueness; (2) blanket catch wraps 409 SESSION_ALREADY_ACTIVE into 500 PIPELINE_INIT_FAILED. Spec: specs/orchestration/auth-identity-error-propagation-model.md. TLA+: artifacts/tlaplus/auth-identity-error-propagation-model/. Related: silmari-writer-cme (bug), silmari-writer-b1w (prior model).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@maceojourdan.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T18:17:46Z","created_by":"maceojourdan","updated_at":"2026-03-03T18:17:46Z"}

{"id":"silmari-writer-cme","title":"URL ingestion returns 500 on active session due JWT-derived userId collision","description":"POST /api/ingestion/url currently maps SESSION_ALREADY_ACTIVE into PIPELINE_INIT_FAILED (500), and AuthAndValidationFilter derives userId from token.substring(0,8). For JWT bearer tokens this commonly becomes user-eyJhbGci for many users, causing cross-user session collisions and persistent active-session conflicts.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@maceojourdan.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T18:07:34Z","created_by":"maceojourdan","updated_at":"2026-03-03T18:07:34Z"}

For JWT bearer tokens this commonly becomes user-eyJhbGci for many users, causing cross-user session collisions and persistent active-session conflicts.","notes":"Implementation plan drafted at thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-03-03--13-23--tdd-auth-identity-error-propagation-fixes.md","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@maceojourdan.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T18:07:34Z","created_by":"maceojourdan","updated_at":"2026-03-03T18:25:07Z"}
